skill_name: Open Local Media And Verify Playback Surface
overview: Use VLC's shortest local-open path to bring a local file onto the playback surface, then verify by visible title, frame, or timeline instead of drifting into settings or unrelated dialogs.
when_to_use: Open a video or audio file from the desktop, Downloads, or another local folder.
Pick one requested file from the VLC system chooser.
Verify that the requested local title or real media frame is the one playing or paused in VLC.
Recover from a mistaken open dialog when the requested local media is already visible.
preconditions: VLC is open and the requested local media is reachable from the Ubuntu filesystem.

atomic_capabilities.name: reach_surface
atomic_capabilities.purpose: Reach the correct VLC surface for open a local file or folder in vlc and verify that the requested media reaches the playback surface.

atomic_capabilities.name: execute_and_verify
atomic_capabilities.purpose: Execute open a local file or folder in vlc and verify that the requested media reaches the playback surface. and verify the visible result state

decision_guide.condition: The correct VLC surface is not open yet.
decision_guide.reason: Opening the wrong panel or menu causes most VLC benchmark failures before the requested edit can start.

decision_guide.condition: The requested VLC change may already be present but needs confirmation.
decision_guide.reason: This skill is complete only when the visible VLC state or saved artifact matches the ask.

decision_guide.condition: The requested file already appears to be loaded and a leftover menu or modal is blocking the surface.
decision_guide.reason: Verification is cheaper and safer than reopening the file or drifting into another open flow.

common_failure_modes: Mistaking already playing media plus a leftover menu or modal for an unopened file.
Opening `Open URL` or another non-local dialog and continuing there instead of returning to the local-file path.
Stopping after the chooser closes without checking that the requested title, frame, or timeline is visible in VLC.

when_to_use: Open a video or audio file from the desktop, Downloads, or another local folder.
Pick one requested file from the VLC system chooser.
Verify that the requested local title is the one playing or paused in VLC.

states.trigger_condition: Use when VLC is already open and the next step is to reach the local file chooser from the Media menu.
states.action: Reach the target VLC surface before acting.
states.text_description: State `open_local_media_picker` belongs to the VLC workflow for open a local file or folder in vlc and verify that the requested media reaches the playback surface.

key_frame.annotation_note: Reach VLC's local file chooser from the Media menu.

highlight_targets.name: Open File menu item
highlight_targets.annotation_query: Open File menu item in the VLC Media menu
fallback_queries: Open File option in the VLC Media dropdown
Ctrl+O menu entry in the VLC Media menu

states.trigger_condition: Use when the Ubuntu file chooser is open and the task still needs the exact local file selected.
states.action: Apply the requested VLC change inside the visible working region.
states.text_description: State `select_requested_local_source` belongs to the VLC workflow for open a local file or folder in vlc and verify that the requested media reaches the playback surface.

key_frame.annotation_note: Select the requested local media row in the chooser.

highlight_targets.name: Requested file row
highlight_targets.annotation_query: green.mp4 row in the Select one or more files to open dialog
fallback_queries: requested media file row in the Ubuntu file chooser
green.mp4 file row in the VLC file chooser

states.visual_grounding: Local media title on playback surface
states.trigger_condition: Use when the local file has already been opened and you need proof that VLC is now on the requested playback surface.
states.action: Verify the requested VLC result is visibly present before stopping.
states.text_description: State `playback_surface_shows_requested_media` belongs to the VLC workflow for open a local file or folder in vlc and verify that the requested media reaches the playback surface.

key_frame.annotation_note: Verify that VLC is now showing the requested local media title.

highlight_targets.name: Local media title on playback surface
highlight_targets.annotation_query: Zhejiang.mp4 title in the VLC title bar
